title: Run timeline artifact (report/run_timeline.md)
description: Contract schema metadata for the deterministic run timeline artifact at report/run_timeline.md. Validation is performed using validation_mode=text_document_v1; see 080_reporting.md (Run timeline artifact).
$comment: This schema is intentionally minimal because the contracted artifact is a UTF-8 LF Markdown document, not a JSON document. Contract tooling MUST validate report/run_timeline.md using the text_document_v1 validator (format and deterministic structure rules live in 080_reporting.md). The contract_version constant exists to satisfy registry invariants and to allow manifest.versions.contracts recording.

required_structure_v1.$comment: Machine-readable copy of the required structure, intended for validator implementations. This definition is not used by JSON Schema engines directly.
